title: Ruizia populnea
intro: Ruizia populnea, also known as Mexican Firebush, is a flowering plant species in the family Anacardiaceae, native to Mexico and Central America. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, reduce oxidative stress, and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Ruizia populnea include flavonoids, terpenoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Ruizia populnea is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, although it is not widely used in commercial herbal preparations due to its limited availability and research on its efficacy.
